title: ardisia racemosa
intro: Ardisia racemosa, also known as the Coral Berry or Whortleberry, is a flowering plant species native to East Asia, including China, Japan, and Korea. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Ardisia racemosa include reducing inflammation, improving blood circulation, and supporting the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health problems.
